pre_truth_filter_locked.speaker: Mr. Byte
pre_truth_filter_locked.text: Employee geometry recognized. Memory response absent.

pre_truth_filter_locked.speaker: Mr. Byte
pre_truth_filter_locked.text: Known operator signal. Unfamiliar response pattern.

pre_truth_filter_locked.speaker: Mr. Byte
pre_truth_filter_locked.text: Return when the arcade recognizes more of you.

truth_filter_intro.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_intro.text: Proceed to the TRUTH FILTER cabinet at the center of this row.

truth_filter_intro.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_intro.text: It is the one that has started humming.

truth_filter_intro.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_intro.text: Cabinet Row contains the primary interface.

truth_filter_completion_anecdote.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_completion_anecdote.text: Broken Score, your token, and the shift log identify operator STAFF 04. The owner name is missing.

truth_filter_completion_anecdote.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_completion_anecdote.text: The same operator was split between keeping the arcade alive and weighing the cost of leaving. One correct answer cannot settle a life.

truth_filter_voice_debrief.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_voice_debrief.text: Additional finding: the hallway broadcast had no registered speaker.

truth_filter_voice_debrief.speaker: Mr. Byte
truth_filter_voice_debrief.text: Every cabinet denied sending it. Ask Gus whether he heard it.

closing_shift_echoes_support.speaker: Mr. Byte
closing_shift_echoes_support.text: Gus is sorting the files. Begin with Mira; recovered connections may supply the rest.

closing_shift_echoes_support.speaker: Mr. Byte
closing_shift_echoes_support.text: The Logs beside this kiosk remain available for Truth Filter reference.

closing_shift_echoes_support.speaker: Mr. Byte
closing_shift_echoes_support.text: Sequence order is part of the evidence.

security_tape_support.speaker: Mr. Byte
security_tape_support.text: Fear response detected in surrounding systems.

security_tape_support.speaker: Mr. Byte
security_tape_support.text: Frames know more than they display.

security_tape_completion_anecdote.speaker: Mr. Byte
security_tape_completion_anecdote.text: It does not yet describe the cause.

security_tape_completion_anecdote.speaker: Mr. Byte
security_tape_completion_anecdote.text: A reconstructed route is evidence, not a verdict on the life that walked it.

staff_records_chain.speaker: Mr. Byte
staff_records_chain.text: The arcade counted what it could not say.

pre_roxy_redirect.speaker: Mr. Byte
pre_roxy_redirect.text: The score cabinet is broadcasting a louder falsehood than my queue.

pre_roxy_redirect.speaker: Mr. Byte
pre_roxy_redirect.text: Resolve Roxy's board first. Then report back for Truth Filter orientation.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: For the record: your signal never once read as stable this whole session. It answered, then corrected itself, like part of it refused to hold still.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: It reads integrated now. The disagreement remains, but both responses share one timing.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: The instability was not corruption. It was two survival strategies refusing to exchange data.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: Resolution is not repair. Integration remains ongoing.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: You returned as the same person without access to the same memories.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Mr. Byte
post_reveal_witness.text: Both statements now pass. Neither makes the other false.
